title: Figure 6 from: Dissanayake LS, Maharachchikumbura SSN, Marasinghe DS, Gao Y, Faraj TKH, Xu J, Wanasinghe DN (2026) Taxonomic novelties and phylogenetic insights into Cainiaceae (Xylariales, Sordariomycetes) associated with Poaceae hosts from Southwestern China. description: Figure 6 Longiappendispora shangrilaensis (holotype HKAS 130459). a. Substrate; b, c. Ascomata on the host surface; d. Section through ostiole; e. Section of ascoma; f. Paraphyses; g. Peridium; h–k. Asci; l. Apical ring bluing in Melzer's reagent; m–r. Ascospores; r. Ascospore stained with Indian ink. Scale bars: 100 μm (d, e); 5 μm (f, l); 50 μm (g–k); 10 μm (m–r).
